caption: Two men sit in a room in front of a television displaying the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt and maintains a skeptical facial expression, while the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and rests his chin on his hand. Behind them is a shelf filled with CDs. In the center of the screen, a smaller video window plays a clip. In the first frame, the inset video shows a sword on the ground with the caption "have been cheating death since i was 14." As the scene progresses, the inset video shifts to a dark silhouette of figures in a dramatic environment, then to a silhouette of a person against a bright light, and finally to a figure in a dark, golden-toned setting. The two men remain in their positions, watching the footage with similar expressions throughout the clip.
